name: CPM Report
subject: Critical Path Report: {project_name} ({date})
body:
Dear Team,

Please find below the Critical Path Method (CPM) analysis for {project_name} as of {date}.

Critical tasks (Total Float = 0) are highlighted. Near-critical tasks have float within the configured threshold.

Please review your tasks and contact {project_manager} with any scheduling concerns.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
body_html:
Dear Team,

Below is the Critical Path Method (CPM) analysis for {project_name} as of {date}.

{html_table}

Critical tasks (shown in red) have zero Total Float. Near-critical tasks are shown in amber.

Please contact {project_manager} with any scheduling concerns.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
